ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample being sequenced */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., blood, tissue) */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Sequencing platform used (e.g., Illumina, PacBio) */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing was performed */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Center where the sequencing was performed */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution associated with the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or lab the researcher is associated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the data */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the data was collected */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "ref_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele at the position */,
  "cons_allele" TEXT /* Consensus allele at the position */,
  "reads1" INTEGER /* Number of reads supporting the consensus allele (sample 1) */,
  "reads2" INTEGER /* Number of reads supporting the alternative allele (sample 2) */,
  "var_freq" TEXT /* Variant frequency at the position */,
  "strands1" INTEGER /* Number of forward reads supporting the consensus allele */,
  "strands2" INTEGER /* Number of reverse reads supporting the consensus allele */,
  "qual1" INTEGER /* Quality score for consensus reads (sample 1) */,
  "qual2" INTEGER /* Quality score for consensus reads (sample 2) */,
  "pvalue" REAL /* P-value for significance of the variant */,
  "map_qual1" INTEGER /* Mapping quality score for reads (sample 1) */,
  "map_qual2" INTEGER /* Mapping quality score for reads (sample 2) */,
  "reads1_plus" INTEGER /* Count of plus strand reads supporting consensus allele (sample 1) */,
  "reads1_minus" INTEGER /* Count of minus strand reads supporting consensus allele (sample 1) */,
  "reads2_plus" INTEGER /* Count of plus strand reads supporting alternative allele (sample 2) */,
  "reads2_minus" INTEGER /* Count of minus strand reads supporting alternative allele (sample 2) */,
  "var_allele" TEXT /* Variant allele at the position */,
  "coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage depth at the position */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype at the position */,
  "phred_score" REAL /* Phred quality score for the variant */,
  "read_length" INTEGER /* Length of the reads */,
  "insert_size" INTEGER /* Insert size of the paired-end reads */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the sequence */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic data (e.g., SRA, local file) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the genomic data (e.g., FASTQ, BAM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES genomic_experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical test) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold applied for significance */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis (e.g., GATK, VEP) */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis method */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_quality" (
  "mapping_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry associated with mapping quality */,
  "map_qual1" INTEGER /* Mapping quality for reads supporting consensus allele (sample 1) */,
  "map_qual2" INTEGER /* Mapping quality for reads supporting consensus allele (sample 2) */,
  "average_mapping_quality" REAL /* Average mapping quality across all reads */,
  "mapping_rate" REAL /* Rate of reads that were successfully mapped */,
  "unmapped_reads" INTEGER /* Number of unmapped reads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_scores" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality score entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry associated with the quality scores */,
  "qual1" INTEGER /* Quality score for sample 1 reads */,
  "qual2" INTEGER /* Quality score for sample 2 reads */,
  "average_quality_score" REAL /* Average quality score across all reads */,
  "quality_score_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of quality scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_scores_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry associated with the frequency */,
  "var_freq" TEXT /* Frequency of the variant */,
  "total_reads" INTEGER /* Total number of reads at the position */,
  "total_var_reads" INTEGER /* Total number of reads supporting the variant allele */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_frequencies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alleles" (
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allele entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry associated with the allele */,
  "ref_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele observed */,
  "cons_allele" TEXT /* Consensus allele observed */,
  "var_allele" TEXT /* Variant allele observed */,
  "allele_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the allele in the population */,
  "allele_count" INTEGER /* Count of the allele in the sample */,
  "allele_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of coverage for the allele */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allele_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alleles_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_data" (
  "experiment_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment-data mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated genomic data entry */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the genomic data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES genomic_experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)
